---
title: "Katherine Olive Helmore"
---

## Katherine Olive Helmore

**Dates:** (1844/5-1923)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was daughter of the Rev. Thomas Helmore (1811-1890), Precentor of St. Mark's College Chelsea and master of the choristers of the Chapel Royal, and his wife Kate Wilson Pridham (1816/7-1886), sister of Mrs Derwent Coleridge.  She was a Gosling as ‘Cobweb’. [1881 census, will index;  Frederick Helmore <i>T. Helmore</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from March 19th [1866]
- Letter from Oct 30th [1865]
- Letter from Sept 7th [1865]
- Letter from April 29th [1865]
- Letter from Novr 22d 1864
- Letter from Jan 20th [1862]
- Letter from [1862]
- Letter from Decr 31st [1861]
- Letter from Decr 30th [1861]
- Letter from St Stephen [26 December 1861]
- Letter from March 18th 1861
- Letter from Feb 26th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
